David Miller Back and Fit: Ready for India T20I Clash

Dec 9, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

David Miller Returns to South African Squad Ahead of T20I Against India

David Miller is back in the South African squad and ready to make his mark as the team prepares for the first T20I against India. After being sidelined due to injury and overseas commitments, Miller’s return is eagerly awaited by fans and selectors alike.
